Web Greece supports Vrachakia/Kirra as one of the local beaches near Galaxidi/Itea. Coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos, and live-condition claims were not changed.

sourceNotes: Fokida OSM identity/location pass 2026-05-27: OSM way 340252013 is a same-name, transliterated, or compatible-name beach feature at or very near the current coordinates. That pass verified identity/location only; access and services were not changed until later direct local sources supported stronger claims.

Blue Flag 2026 import 2026-06-01: official Blue Flag Greece awards page lists one or more matching awarded beach sections for this record. Static certification metadata only; coordinates, access, windProfile, scoring, photos, confidence and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

Popular confidence pass BM 2026-06-02: i-lovegreece directly supports Kalafatis on the south Fokida coast at Galaxidi, organized beach setup with loungers/umbrellas, sea-sports facilities and beach-bar coffee/drink/snack context. Terrabook's Galaxidi beaches page lists Kalafatis as a fully organized nearby beach with umbrellas, sun beds and canteen. The official Blue Flag direct beach page confirms Kalafatis / Kalafatis in Fokida, Municipality of Delphi, Galaxidi municipal unit, awarded for 2026. Exploring Greece supports road access, normal depth, pebble seabed and small-pebble beach terrain. Promoted to high for static facts only; unsupported parking, tavern/settlement amenities, asphalt-road certainty and deep-water certainty were removed or neutralized. WindProfile, scoring, coordinates, photos and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

Popular confidence pass BN 2026-06-02: Terrabook's Galaxidi beaches page directly lists Kentri as a small Galaxidi beach at the southern end of the waterfront, next to the Galaxidi school of tourism professions, with pebble terrain and many umbrellas/sunbeds during summer. Galaxa Mansion's local Galaxidi beaches page independently supports Kentri as the best-known/crowded small beach in the pine-shaded Galaxidi beach area, with pebbles and sand. Promoted to high for static facts only; unsupported parking, nearby cafe/taverna/settlement amenities, asphalt-road certainty and deep-water certainty were removed or neutralized. WindProfile, scoring, coordinates, photos and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

sourceNotes: Phase 2 final global organized-service cleanup 2026-05-26: downgraded unsupported organized-service claim because no direct source URL is recorded; kept nearby food/parking notes only.

Source follow-up pass 21 2026-05-27: direct Terrabook Fokida page supports Marathias seaside settlement/beach local-area identity traceability only. Confidence, coordinates, access, services, amenities, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

Blue Flag 2026 import 2026-06-01: official Blue Flag Greece awards page lists one or more matching awarded beach sections for this record. Static certification metadata only; coordinates, access, windProfile, scoring, photos, confidence and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

Popular confidence pass BJ 2026-06-02: Terrabook's direct Paralia Marathia page supports the beach in front of the Marathias fishing village, pebbly terrain, large organized section, nearby traditional tavernas and accommodation/hotel context. Blue Flag Greece 2026 lists Marathias under Dorida/Fokida, and Dorida municipality's 2025 beach press release supports Marathias in the municipality Blue Flag programme. Promoted to high for static facts only; unsupported deep-water certainty, parking, cafe and on-beach natural-shade claims were removed or neutralized. WindProfile, scoring, coordinates, photos, and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

sourceNotes: OSM source pass 2026-05-27: same-name natural=beach feature near stored coordinates supports identity/location only. That pass did not change access, services, amenities, windProfile or scoring.

Popular confidence pass BO 2026-06-02: MeVrikes directly supports Agios Andreas as a seaside settlement of Fokida/Delphi in the western Antikyra bay, also called Kerantrias locally, with a pebbly beach used for summer swimming/rest. Terrabook's Desfina beaches page independently supports Agios Andreas/Kerantrias southeast of Desfina and distinguishes the central same-name pebbly beach from nearby Gyalinammos. Promoted to high for static facts only; unsupported asphalt-road certainty, parking, nearby cafe/taverna/settlement amenities, coarse-sand terrain and shallow-water certainty were removed or neutralized. WindProfile, scoring, coordinates, photos and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

sourceNotes: Popular source-backed confidence pass AF 2026-06-02: moved Paralia Chiliadou from West Greece/Aetolia-Acarnania to Central Greece/Fokida because the official bathing-water profile places Chiliadou in Fokida, Dorida Municipality, and the Blue Flag 2026 official list also places Chiliadou under Fokida/Dorida. Promoted to high for static source-backed facts only.

Pass AF static metadata: official profile supports Monastiraki bay identity, asphalt-road access, rocky shore/seabed, deep first metres, partly organized umbrellas/loungers, shower/WC, seasonal water-sport facilities, refreshment building and nearby restaurants/tavernas. Removed unsupported natural-shade claim. Source wind/exposure wording was not imported into windProfile, scoring, or live calm/protected/safe claims. Coordinates and photos were not changed.

accessNotes.de: I Paralia Sergoylas/Ampelaki einai parathalassio theretro sti Dorida me touristikes ypodomes stin akti, alla oi piges den epivevaionoun kathara tin epifaneia tou telikoy dromou.
accessNotes.it: I Paralia Sergoylas/Ampelaki einai parathalassio theretro sti Dorida me touristikes ypodomes stin akti, alla oi piges den epivevaionoun kathara tin epifaneia tou telikoy dromou.

access.label: Οδική πρόσβαση, επιφάνεια μη επιβεβαιωμένη
access.notes: Η Παραλία Σεργούλας/Αμπελάκι είναι παραθαλάσσιο θέρετρο στη Δωρίδα με τουριστικές υποδομές στην ακτή, αλλά οι πηγές δεν επιβεβαιώνουν καθαρά την επιφάνεια του τελικού δρόμου.

waterDepth.label: Βαθιά νερά
waterDepth.notes: Το βάθος συνήθως ανεβαίνει πιο γρήγορα μετά την είσοδο στη θάλασσα.

sourceNotes: Popular confidence pass BL 2026-06-02: Terrabook directly supports Paralia Sergoulas in southern Fokida on the Corinthian Gulf, nearly 1 km beach length, the Ampelaki and Platania beach sections, pebbly shoreline, plane trees reaching the sea, tavern/cafe/tourism-service context and visitor infrastructure. Dorida's official tourism page independently supports the Sergoula beach stop and old plane-tree shade reaching the sea.

Secondary direct beach sources support organized/deep-water static context: i-lovegreece describes the Sergoula beach as pebbly, organized with loungers and umbrellas, and deep-water. The official Blue Flag beach page confirms the 2026 Sergoula award in Fokida / Dorida / Efpalio and lists Dorida Municipality as manager. Promoted to high for static beach facts only; unsupported parking/canteen specificity and asphalt-road certainty were removed. WindProfile, scoring, coordinates, photos and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

sourceNotes: Popular confidence pass 2026-06-02: Terrabook directly supports Skaloma as a popular Fokida beach with pebbles, tall trees at one end and nearby taverns/cafes; Blue Flag Greece supports the awarded Skaloma beach section; WonderGreece supports the better-organized visitor context and notes deeper water. Source wording about very still water was not imported as static truth. Confidence promoted to high; windProfile, scoring, coordinates and photos were not changed.
